abstract: This meta-analysis examines when three types of automated agents (AAs)—robots, chatbots, and algorithms—are equivalent to human agents (HAs) in marketing roles. An analysis of 943 effect sizes from 327 studies provides novel insights. First, customers may be skeptical of AAs; however, they value their performance and eventually choose or buy from them as if they were interacting with HAs. Second, each of the three AA types has a unique set of contingencies that affect its human equivalence; previously identified contingencies do not generalize and can even have opposing effects across AA types. This study also identifies novel contingencies, such as the multifaceted concept of artificial intelligence required to fulfill a task. Third, some contingencies make AAs more humanlike, while others make their machine characteristics salient. These findings enrich the concept of automated social presence (ASP), suggesting that AAs are hybrid beings with a social presence (i.e., the feeling of interacting with a humanlike entity) and an automated presence (i.e., the feeling of interacting with a machine entity). The authors provide recommendations on when AAs can replace HAs in marketing roles to release capacity and alleviate labor shortages. They also suggest a future research agenda.

ob.ai_reason: 机器人/聊天机器人/算法与人类代理元分析，直接研究AI
ob.tldr: 元分析探讨机器人、聊天机器人和算法三类自动代理何时能替代人类代理。基于943个效应量、327项研究的结果表明：客户起初对自动代理持怀疑态度，但认可其绩效表现，购买决策最终与人类代理相当。三类自动代理各有独特权变因素，传统因素不能泛化甚至产生相反效果，如任务所需AI的多面性概念是新发现的关键因素。研究提出自动化社会存在(ASP)概念，认为自动代理兼具社会存在与自动存在的混合特征，并就何时可用自动代理替代人类代理释放产能、缓解劳动力短缺提出建议。

ur.ai_reason: 客户对机器人/聊天机器人/算法的反应元分析，含消费者行为研究
ur.tldr: 对327项研究、943个效应量进行元分析发现，客户对机器人、聊天机器人和算法等自动化代理的态度呈现怀疑但最终绩效接受、购买行为与人类代理相当。三类自动化代理的权变因素各不相同，甚至相反；任务所需AI多面性等新因素揭示其兼具社会存在感与机器感知的混合特征。提供何时可用自动化代理替代人类代理的实务建议。

title: Automated Versus Human Agents: A Meta-Analysis of Customer Responses to Robots, Chatbots, and Algorithms and Their Contingencies
title_zh: 自动化代理与人类代理：客户对机器人、聊天机器人和算法的反应元分析
